productName: Yellow Jackets (2 mini 1/2g per tube) - Hazy Daze (White Star ) & Blue Dream (Freedom Farms) (S)
description: This infused sativa pre-roll wraps Hazy Train flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — bright, citrusy-spicy notes, delivering an upbeat, talkative energy. Pace yourself.
